body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Body-energy** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Interoception — visceral perception, cardiac interoception, insula, vagal signaling, felt aliveness.

**Altered dorsal anterior insula functional connectivity underlying abnormal interoceptive accuracy awareness in migraine without aura.**. J Headache Pain.. PMID: 41787270. DOI: 10.1186/s10194-026-02318-x. BACKGROUND: Abnormal interoception is increasingly recognized as akey feature of migraine. The dorsal anterior insula (dAI) is hypothesized to play acentral role in interoceptive processing, yet the neural mechanisms underlying this abnormality remain unclear.
